text:

    security/kc: add YUBIKEY option

    Remove pcre support.
    Add TEST_DEPENDS and use bash instead of sh in tests.
    Shorten pkg-message.
    Switch to DISTVERSION.
    Pet portlint, portfmt.

    PR:             277801
    Approved by:    submitter is maintainer
